name: SCAR-20 | 执行者
descriptionEn: The SCAR-20 is a semi-automatic sniper rifle that trades a high rate of fire and powerful long-distance damage for sluggish movement speed and big price tag. A sunset gradient has been meticulously painted on different parts of the weapon. Automatic solutions from SYMETRY SMART GUN CORP
descriptionZh: SCAR-20 是一把以迟缓的移动速度和高昂的价格为代价，换取高射速及强大的远距离杀伤力的半自动狙击步枪。 在武器的不同部位处精心绘制了日落般的渐变图样。 来自对称智能枪械集团的自动解决方案。
